name: nat-vent-at-comfort-floor-no-activate
description: Indoor at comfort_heat floor (70F); sensor opens — floor guard prevents activation even though outdoor is cooler

verdict.summary: When indoor is already at comfort_heat, nat vent must not activate regardless of outdoor temp
verdict.observed_behavior: paused with indoor at comfort floor
verdict.expected_behavior: paused with indoor at comfort floor

events.note: indoor exactly at comfort_heat=70F; outdoor cooler but floor guard must block activation
sensor opens when indoor is at comfort floor

assertions.reason: indoor 70F == comfort_heat 70F — floor guard blocks nat vent activation; pulling in 65F air would immediately violate comfort floor
